THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAGUDO, DOLORES C. RAGUDO, FILEMON JR. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 5775 MISSION, STAYED UNTIL MAY-01-1996, PROVIDED DEFTS COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF STIP. STAY MAY BE LIFTED BEFORE THAT DATE ONLY ON PLTF'S MOT W/ 5 DYS NOTICE TO DEFTS. IF DEFTS COMPLY W/ STIP UNTIL THAT DATE, PLTF WILL FILE SATISFACTION OF JDMT. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KAO, JANE AS TO DEFENDANT RAGUDO, DOLORES C. RAGUDO, FILEMON JR. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
